name: proxy
description: Soft proxy: probe http_proxy reachability and either set (Weizmann on-campus) or clear (off-campus / home network) machine-scope http_proxy/https_proxy/no_proxy env vars, HKCU IE/WinINet proxy keys (cygwin setup-x86_64.exe reads these), and machine WinHTTP proxy (Windows Update / BITS). Override with -ForceMode use|direct.
